query:
INSERT INTO billings (project_id, amount, status, description, due_date) 
         VALUES ($1, 
            CASE 
                WHEN $2 = '190.00' THEN 190.00
                WHEN $2 = '260.00' THEN 260.00
                WHEN $2 = '400.00' THEN 400.00
                ELSE 165.00
            END, 
            'PENDING', $3, NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days')
